pages.title: Ghost Archive
pages.caption: A preserved skald vault opens, broadcasting a map encoded in old verse.

pages.title: Oathfire Relay
pages.caption: Clan heralds ignite an oathfire beacon that can summon allies or rivals.

pages.title: Docking Gridlock
pages.caption: Three rival fleets demand priority berths as emergency sirens roll across Ring C.

pages.title: Airlock Negotiation
pages.caption: Station marshals broker a ceasefire in an airlock lined with cargo mechs.

pages.title: Blackout Protocol
pages.caption: Auxiliary lights fail in sequence as someone cuts comms across the inner ring.

pages.title: Mirror Sea
pages.caption: Survey craft glide over an unnaturally still ocean reflecting a double sunrise.

pages.title: Signal Below
pages.caption: A pulse from the abyss outlines the buried geometry of a submerged city.

pages.title: Core Heist
pages.caption: Outlaw pilot Kael intercepts a reactor convoy in the flare shadow of the Sunforge.

pages.title: Foundry Uprising
pages.caption: Workers cut the heat shields and raise rebel beacons across the orbital furnaces.
